rows.description: Chese Will pro Bien: vel circiter
rows.notes: Values selected from gemini-flash. gemini-flash's note detailed a necessary reinterpretation of '13 3/4' pence (which is invalid) into 8 shillings, 3 pence 3/4, which aligns with historical accounting practice of carrying over pence to shillings. This reasoning is superior to gpt-5-mini's less clear interpretation. Description 'Chese Will' is also more accurate.
